prediction.reasoning: For a 2-day prediction of CSCO, I used typical stock volatility patterns. CSCO has historical daily volatility around 1.8-2.2%. For 2 days, this translates to approximately 2.5-3.1% volatility. The point estimate assumes no directional bias. Confidence intervals are constructed assuming log-normal distribution of returns, with 50% CI covering ±0.85 standard deviations, 80% CI covering ±1.28 standard deviations, and 90% CI covering ±1.64 standard deviations of the estimated 2-day volatility.
